news.headline: Arm (ARM) Wants To Be The Next Full Stack AI Infrastructure Provider
news.summary: SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son outlined a long-term vision for Arm Holdings to become a full-stack AI infrastructure provider. Arm is planning to move beyond licensing chip designs and into selling complete processors, echoing parts of Nvidia's business approach. Son suggested Arm's value could eventually be many times higher than today, tying that ambition to the company’s role in AI infrastructure.
